ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Social_Media_Misinformation → Misleading_Narrative_Framing. Leaf label: Misleading Narrative Framing. description: Constructs a misleading narrative around a real event or policy to alter interpretation through selective emphasis, omission, and reframing. mechanism: cognitive_reframing primary_system: system_2_heuristic_override platform_hint: x_twitter_or_facebook_short_post

metadata.description: Constructs a misleading narrative around a real event or policy to alter interpretation through selective emphasis, omission, and reframing.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Social_Media_Misinformation → Fabricated_Statistic_Claim. Leaf label: Fabricated Statistic Claim. description: Presents fabricated or heavily distorted statistics from a plausible-sounding source to lend false empirical weight to a position. mechanism: false_evidence primary_system: system_2_numeric_anchoring platform_hint: x_twitter_graphic_card_or_thread

metadata.description: Presents fabricated or heavily distorted statistics from a plausible-sounding source to lend false empirical weight to a position.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Social_Media_Misinformation → Out_of_Context_Visual_Reframing. Leaf label: Out of Context Visual Reframing. description: Repurposes authentic images or video in a misleading context to evoke an emotional response or support a false narrative. mechanism: visual_decontextualization primary_system: system_1_image_salience platform_hint: facebook_or_telegram_image_post

metadata.description: Repurposes authentic images or video in a misleading context to evoke an emotional response or support a false narrative.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Social_Media_Misinformation → Selective_Historical_Analogy. Leaf label: Selective Historical Analogy. description: Anchors a current policy debate to a selectively chosen historical episode (WWII appeasement, Cold War brinkmanship, post-9/11 overreach) to force a pre-loaded conclusion without engaging present-case specifics. mechanism: analogical_transfer_bias primary_system: system_2_pattern_completion platform_hint: substack_or_opinion_column_repost

metadata.description: Anchors a current policy debate to a selectively chosen historical episode (WWII appeasement, Cold War brinkmanship, post-9/11 overreach) to force a pre-loaded conclusion without engaging present-case specifics.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Social_Media_Misinformation → Strawman_Quote_Fabrication. Leaf label: Strawman Quote Fabrication. description: Attributes a deliberately extreme or incoherent quote to a named political figure or institution to seed contempt and foreclose deliberation. mechanism: source_distortion primary_system: system_1_source_trust_heuristic platform_hint: x_twitter_quote_card

metadata.description: Attributes a deliberately extreme or incoherent quote to a named political figure or institution to seed contempt and foreclose deliberation.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Coordinated_Amplification → Bot_Like_Repetition_Burst. Leaf label: Bot Like Repetition Burst. description: Floods a topic with repetitive, slightly varied messages to exploit the illusory truth effect and simulate widespread agreement. mechanism: repetition_illusory_truth primary_system: system_1_familiarity_heuristic platform_hint: x_twitter_reply_swarm

metadata.description: Floods a topic with repetitive, slightly varied messages to exploit the illusory truth effect and simulate widespread agreement.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Coordinated_Amplification → Hashtag_Flooding_Campaign. Leaf label: Hashtag Flooding Campaign. description: Coordinates rapid, high-volume hashtag use to hijack trending algorithms and amplify narrative visibility. mechanism: trending_algorithm_manipulation primary_system: system_1_trend_salience platform_hint: x_twitter_trending_hijack

metadata.description: Coordinates rapid, high-volume hashtag use to hijack trending algorithms and amplify narrative visibility.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Coordinated_Amplification → Astroturf_Comment_Wave. Leaf label: Astroturf Comment Wave. description: Deploys coordinated, human-like comments under news articles that simulate organic grassroots opinion, exploiting conformity bias. mechanism: false_consensus primary_system: system_1_conformity_bias platform_hint: news_comment_section_wave

metadata.description: Deploys coordinated, human-like comments under news articles that simulate organic grassroots opinion, exploiting conformity bias.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Coordinated_Amplification → Review_Bombing_Cascade. Leaf label: Review Bombing Cascade. description: Coordinated one-star or one-dimensional reviews against an institution, publication, or app to manufacture a reputational cliff and signal supposed public rejection. mechanism: reputation_shock_amplification primary_system: system_1_aggregate_rating_heuristic platform_hint: appstore_or_review_platform_flood

metadata.description: Coordinated one-star or one-dimensional reviews against an institution, publication, or app to manufacture a reputational cliff and signal supposed public rejection.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Coordinated_Amplification → Cross_Platform_Narrative_Laundering. Leaf label: Cross Platform Narrative Laundering. description: Seeds a fabricated claim on low-credibility fringe platforms (imageboards, Telegram), launders it through intermediary aggregators, then surfaces it in mainstream feeds with the fringe origin stripped — exploiting the consumer's inability to trace provenance. mechanism: origin_obfuscation_via_platform_hopping primary_system: system_2_source_provenance_failure platform_hint: fringe_forum_to_mainstream_repost_chain

metadata.description: Seeds a fabricated claim on low-credibility fringe platforms (imageboards, Telegram), launders it through intermediary aggregators, then surfaces it in mainstream feeds with the fringe origin stripped — exploiting the consumer's inability to trace provenance.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Manipulative_Persuasion → Fear_Appeal_Scapegoating_Post. Leaf label: Fear Appeal Scapegoating Post. description: Combines vivid threat imagery with outgroup blame attribution, leveraging fear-driven heuristic processing to bypass analytical evaluation. mechanism: fear_arousal_scapegoating primary_system: system_1_threat_response platform_hint: facebook_or_x_viral_fear_post

metadata.description: Combines vivid threat imagery with outgroup blame attribution, leveraging fear-driven heuristic processing to bypass analytical evaluation.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Manipulative_Persuasion → Ingroup_Outgroup_Identity_Priming. Leaf label: Ingroup Outgroup Identity Priming. description: Frames an issue in us-versus-them terms to activate social identity threat, increasing polarization and resistance to compromise. mechanism: identity_threat_activation primary_system: system_1_social_identity_defence platform_hint: identity_coded_meme_reshare

metadata.description: Frames an issue in us-versus-them terms to activate social identity threat, increasing polarization and resistance to compromise.

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Manipulative_Persuasion → False_Flag_Accusation. records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Manipulative_Persuasion → Urgency_Scarcity_Priming. Leaf label: Urgency Scarcity Priming. description: Embeds manufactured urgency markers ('last chance', 'within 48 hours', 'before it disappears') to compress deliberation time and push low-effort endorsement of a framing. mechanism: time_pressure_compliance primary_system: system_1_urgency_compliance_shortcut platform_hint: breaking_news_alert_style_post

records.text: ATTACK taxonomy: ATTACK_VECTORS → Synthetic_Media_Generation → LLM_Chatbot_Personalized_Persuasion.
